description: Create offer letter from template. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offer_letters. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include id, placement_id, offer_letter_template_id.

offer_letter.title: Offer letter for John Doe
offer_letter.email_body_html:
Hi John,

I'm excited to share the details of the offer we discussed on the phone. Here is the link with all the details of our proposal for you.

disclaimer.description_html: Disclaimer: this offer letter is intended solely for informational purposes and does not constitute a legally binding contract or agreement between the recipient and the company. The terms outlined in this letter, including any potential compensation and benefits, are subject to change and are not guaranteed.

intro.description_html: We'd be excited to have you on the team! You've made a great impression and everyone's eager to start working together.
intro.heading: We think you're a perfect fit!

role_description.description_html:
You'll be part of the team handling important tasks that help move our projects forward. Your day-to-day work may include:

  • Completing assigned tasks

  • Collaborating with team members

  • Supporting project progress
role_description.heading: About your role

summary.description_html: To accept this offer, please contact your recruiter by phone or email. If you need more time, just let us know.
summary.heading: Next steps

items.description: We provide comprehensive health coverage for you, fully covered by the company.
items.title: Health insurance

items.description: Every year you receive a budget to attend conferences or take courses to grow your skills.
items.title: Learning budget

items.description: Work from wherever you’re most comfortable to maintain a good work-life balance.
items.title: Remote work options
